welcomeMessage: Welcome to a journey of knowledge to enlighten the mind and soul.
rulesScrollPrompt: You must scroll to the end to continue.
rulesReadButton: I have read the rules, let's play!

loading.noQuestions: No questions available for this combination.

musafir.title: Musafir Mode (Solo)
musafir.description: Play questions until you lose your 3 lives. Go for your personal best!

majlis.title: Majlis Mode (Group)
majlis.description: Compete in turns with 2-6 players. Each has 3 lives. The game ends when only one player remains or the rounds are completed.

difficulty.title: Difficulty and Time
difficulty.easy: Basic facts and well-known names. (30 seconds)

lifelines.title: Lifeline Mechanics
lifelines.inventory: Each player has their own inventory per game.

fiftyFifty.title: 50/50 (The Discernment)
fiftyFifty.description: Removes 2 incorrect answers. You have 2 uses per game.

extraTime.title: Extra Time (Sabr)
extraTime.description: Adds 15 seconds to the timer. You have 2 uses per game.

skip.title: Skip Question (Hijrah)
skip.description: Moves to the next question without losing lives. You have 1 use per game (only in Medium and Hard difficulty).

scoring.title: Scoring System
scoring.category: Category Multiplier: Seerah (1.2x), Prophets (1.1x), Quran & General (1.0x)
scoring.timeBonus: Time Bonus: Up to 30% extra based on how fast you answer.
scoring.accumulation: Global Progress: All your points accumulate on the Leaderboard.

musafirMode.title: Musafir Mode
musafirMode.description: A solo journey of knowledge. How far can you go?

majlisMode.title: Majlis Mode
majlisMode.description: Gather your family and friends for a group challenge.

learnMode.title: Learn
learnMode.description: Review with no clock and no lives. Each card shows the answer, the explanation and its source.

category.seerahDescription: Dive into the life, battles, and teachings of Prophet Muhammad (ﷺ).
category.prophetsDescription: Test your knowledge on the stories of the prophets, from Adam (AS) to Isa (AS).
category.generalDescription: Explore revelation, basic Fiqh, Islamic history, and the pillars of faith.
category.mixDescription: A random challenge from all categories for the chosen difficulty.

game.shareMessage: I scored {{score}}/100 ({{correct}}/{{total}} correct) in Noor of Knowledge. Can you beat it?
game.shareUnavailable: Sharing is not available on this device

play.exitDescription: Your progress in this game will be lost. Are you sure you want to exit?
play.reviewHint: Take your time to read the explanation and source. Press Next when you're ready.

feedback.title: AI Feedback
feedback.error: AI wisdom is currently unavailable. Please continue.

solo.title: End of the Journey
solo.description: Your quest for knowledge has ended... for now.

0.title: Novice of Light
0.description: You have taken the first step on the path of knowledge. Keep learning!

1.title: Seeker of Scriptures
1.description: Your journey is underway. The verses are opening up to you.

2.title: Scholar of the Sunnah
2.description: You show great promise and understanding. Your dedication shines brightly.

3.title: Sage of the Sahaba
3.description: Masha-Allah! Your knowledge is vast and deep, a true beacon of light.

learn.tapHint: Pick an option to see the explanation

notFound.title: Route not found
notFound.description: This page is not on the map.

welcome.subtitle: A journey of knowledge to enlighten the mind and soul

stats.title: Statistics
stats.noRankYet: No rank yet — play your first game!

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetConfirm: Delete all your progress? This cannot be undone.
settings.privacyBody: Noor of Knowledge collects no personal data. Everything is stored on your device only.

onboarding.title: Your journey starts here
onboarding.subtitle: Answer questions, rank up, and unlock achievements. Knowledge is light.
